title: cerasus × subhirtella f. tama-clivorum
intro: Cerasus × subhirtella f. tama-clivorum, also known as Tama Clivorum Cherry, is a cultivar of flowering cherry tree that is a cross between Prunus subhirtella and Prunus serrulata. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tama Clivorum Cherry include its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its ability to improve cardiovascular health and immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal and health benefits.
